sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince fixed fractional method: Position Size = f × Account Equity, where f is optimal fraction and positions are infinitely divisible. Theoretical zero risk of ruin but practical risk slightly higher than constant-contract due to real-world constraints. Parameters (optimal_f, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown_tolerance) not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Use fixed fractional trading position sizing, which theoretically has zero risk of ruin because positions can be traded in infinitely divisible units, though in practice risk of ruin is slightly higher than constant-contract trading due to real-world limitations.
